title: Rage twist
description: A simple datapack that adds a ragebar that can be increased by attacking mobs and that makes your attack damage increase.
body:
# Rage twist
_Take risks. Unleash power_
This is a simple datapack that motivates players to take some more risks and fight a bit more for a reward of more power! Players will have a "Rage Meter" at the top of their screen that tells them the amount of rage they possess. The more rage they have the more damage they do (capped at +50% attack damage), with every notch adding an additional +2.5% attack damage. This rage meter goes up while attacking mobs but also goes passively down if you do not deal any damage.
## Visuals?
Yes, there are visual hints to how much rage a player possesses. The higher your rage gets the more angry particles appear above your head.
